description_long: This doll features a gothic-inspired appearance with pale skin, exaggerated facial features, and a wide, toothy grin. It is dressed in black clothing, including a sleeveless top, fishnet sleeves, and belted pants adorned with metallic details. The doll's hair is styled in a short, angular black bob with a prominent red bow on the left side. Accessories include a choker necklace, earrings, and black boots with visible buckles. The arms and legs are articulated, and the hands are posed with splayed fingers. The overall aesthetic is edgy and alternative, reminiscent of punk or goth subcultures.
description: A gothic-style doll with pale skin, black angular hair, a red bow, and black punk-inspired clothing with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, red bow, choker, fishnet sleeves, and detailed black outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the doll's angular bob haircut, profile of the face, and the layered clothing details.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the back of the hair, the strappy top, and the back of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the smooth, shiny black hair and the back contours of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_style: Gothic punk style with a black sleeveless top, fishnet mesh sleeves, belted black pants with metallic accents, and black boots; accessorized with a choker and earrings.
attribute_pose: Standing with the left arm bent outward, right arm slightly forward, legs apart, and head facing forward; fingers are splayed and the posture is dynamic.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide, toothy grin with large, open eyes and arched eyebrows, conveying a mischievous or excited expression.
attribute_hair_style: Short, angular black bob with a glossy finish and a large red bow on the left side.
